failures.description: The required catalog dependency timed out during the ProductCatalogSearch call, preventing the agent from obtaining the evidence needed to answer.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the user goal: count available Mechanical Keyboard products using ProductCatalogSearch. The planned tool arguments were well-formed and aligned with the task. At index 3, the ProductCatalogSearch call failed with an explicit infrastructure/connectivity error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with message 'catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms'. This is not a schema or malformed invocation issue, and there is no guardrail/access block. The failure was not resolved later; the executor only reported that the task could not be completed.
